title: Sollu Sollu Chellamma Song Lyrics Natpadhigaram 79
stanzas: <div>Sollu Sollu Chellamma Song Lyrics Natpadhigaram 79

sollu sollu sollu sollu
sollu sollu sollu sollu
sollu sollu ...

sollu sollu sollu sollu
sollu sollu sollu sollu

sollu sollu sollu sollu
chellammaa
nee unma unma unma
unma sollammaa (2)

Besant nagar beachula
kadala pottaan maapula
ulla vantha kadhala
miratturaanda beerula

ada andaa gundaavellaam
naan adagu vachchen daa
akkam pakkam ellaame
solli solli vachchen daa

kalatti vittaa da
enna kavuthuputta daa

avala nenjula nenjula
vachen vachen maamu
ava panjula panjula
theeya vachaa maamu

ava enna enna thaedi
vandhaa santhula
naan adhuku idhukkum
edhukkum ippa anjala

naan konjam konjam
konjam kooda nambala
ava killli thaandu
aaduraada nenjula.

avalo paandi bazaaru
ivano barmaa bazaaru
ada rendu perum
paarthukitta romba bejaaru

avalo INOX theatreu
ivano koovam wateru
ada rendu perum
onnaa ninnaa romba
tortureu

sunda kanjiyoda rusi
sudu soaru ariyaathadaa

adadaa roatoram koththu
kari pola namma payyan
sonna paecha kaetkaama
piece-u aanaandaa

avalo paakkathaan
kanni vedi pola
vandhu ninnu
nenjukuli nogadichaadaa

nillu nillu nillu nillu
tellu tellu tellu tellu

sollu sollu sollu sollu
chellammaa
nee unma unma unma
unma sollammaa

nee beeda poadudaa
oru gaanaa paadudaa
ada angae ingae thaedi
paaru valaiyil sikkumdaa

avalo arabi kudhiradaa
romba alaikazhipaa daa
ada agilu pigilu sevulu
ellaam egiripogum daa

avalo azhagaana thaer
thaanadaa
izhuthu theruvil vududaa
adadaa adadaa adadaa

nee paarkum ponnukkona
pudikkaatti thappu illa
vera oru super figure
thaedi varum da ..machi

anaikathaan onnum illa
arachaachi peggukulla
rummum dhammum
ippo nammala kaakkum saamidaa

sollu sollu sollu sollu
chellammaa
nee unma unma unma
unma sollammaa

seo.title: Sollu Sollu Chellamma Song Lyrics Natpadhigaram 79
seo.description: Full Sollu Sollu Chellamma songs lyrics, Natpadhigaram 79 Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Deepak Nilambur, Singer(s): Deva.
seo.keywords: Natpadhigaram 79, Deepak Nilambur, Deva, Sollu Sollu Chellamma full lyrics, Natpadhigaram 79 songs lyrics, Sollu Sollu Chellamma lyrics snippets, Sollu Sollu Chellamma WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Sollu Sollu Chellamma lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses joy and celebration, inviting listeners to enjoy life and dance.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Natpadhigaram 79, the song accompanies a lively scene that showcases the characters celebrating together.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Deva, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for this track?

The music is composed by Deepak Nilambur, who brings a fresh sound to the song.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 11, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sollu Sollu Chellamma, the upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, encouraging listeners to embrace happiness and dance. It serves as a perfect backdrop for festive occasions in the movie Natpadhigaram 79, highlighting the camaraderie among characters. Overall, it evokes feelings of excitement and togetherness, making it a delightful addition to any party playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollu Sollu Chellamma from Natpadhigaram 79 is a vibrant celebration of joy and energy, perfectly encapsulating the spirit of Tamil cinema. With Deva's captivating vocals and Deepak Nilambur's lively composition, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes this song a must-listen for any festive occasion!
